visual.name: ganttDeneb
visual.description: Gantt chart powered by Vega (David Bacci template). Scroll left/right to pan horizontally, scroll up/down to pan vertically.

dataRoles.name: hierarchy
dataRoles.description: Arraste 1 ou mais colunas. A primeira vira o grupo principal (fase); as seguintes criam sub-níveis dentro dele (ex: CWA → Disciplina → Sub-Disciplina).

dataRoles.name: milestone
dataRoles.description: True if this row is a milestone

dataRoles.name: dependencies
dataRoles.description: Comma-separated list of predecessor task IDs

dataRoles.name: status
dataRoles.description: Status label (Low / Medium / High / Very High)
